MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
John P. Strouss, Esq., of Law Offices of John P. Strouss II, Tel: 800-484-5161- moving party
Kylie M. Brousseau, Esq. of WOOD, SMITH, HENNING & BERMAN LLP. Tel: 951.779.5000 for defendants.

A hearing is required. The matter was heard and discussed. Upon conclusion of the proceedings rules as follows:

COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF MARC GERSEN'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is Granted

Before the court is an unopposed Motion to be Relieved as Counsel from Counsel John P. Strouss III and Law Offices of John P. Strouss III, counsel of record for Plaintiff Marc Gersen.

The court notes this motion was on calendar on September 29, 2025, at which time counsel informed the court Plaintiff Gersen had asked that the motion be continued a couple of weeks. The court continued the hearing but has not received an opposition from Plaintiff.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
